case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. MELCHOR A. VELASCO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELASCO, MELCHOR A. $9,402.63 PRINCIPAL, $179.90 INTEREST, $269.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,852.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT ASSIGNED TO TD BANK USA, N.A., FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT VELASCO, MELCHOR A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT VELASCO, MELCHOR A. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-22-2011
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $10,183.33 AS TO DEFENDANT VELASCO, MELCHOR A.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $269.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT VELASCO, MELCHOR A.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VELASCO, MELCHOR A.
